PAUSE_MENU.manualSaveCreated.title: Manual Save Created
PAUSE_MENU.manualSaveCreated.body: A snapshot of the current run was added to the NyMod saves archive.
PAUSE_MENU.manualSaveFailed.title: Manual Save Failed
PAUSE_MENU.manualSaveFailed.body: The current run could not be archived. Check the log for details.
SAVE_BROWSER.noteDialog.label.snapshot: Add or edit the note for this archived snapshot.
SAVE_BROWSER.noteDialog.label.run: Add or edit the note for this archived run.
POPUP.loadFailed.title: Load Failed
POPUP.loadFailed.restoreFailed.body: The selected snapshot could not be restored into the active save slot.
The restored singleplayer save could not be read by the game.
POPUP.loadFailed.multiplayerUnreadable.b: The restored multiplayer save could not be read by the game.
POPUP.loadFailed.multiplayerMainMenuMiss: Main menu is not available for multiplayer restore.
POPUP.openFolderFailed.title: Open Folder Failed
POPUP.openFolderFailed.body:
The save archive folder could not be opened:
{Path}
